completed_tasks.name: Write failing tests (RED) for all 4 success criteria
Implement load_state, save_state, yt-dlp detection, skip loop (GREEN)

human_actions_pending.action: Manual verification of sale_item_id field in live Bandcamp API responses
human_actions_pending.context: The field name 'sale_item_id' was locked by user decision but not independently verified against live API. The guard (item.get('sale_item_id', '')) handles missing field gracefully.

decisions.rationale: User-confirmed in discuss-phase. Stable numeric ID tied to purchase record.
Minimal metadata — enough to show skip messages and debug without re-fetching API.

decisions.decision: Write state after successful download only
decisions.rationale: Failed items retry on next run. Only write on yt-dlp exit code 0.
One line per skipped item, visually distinct from download lines.

decisions.decision: yt-dlp detection at startup via shutil.which
decisions.rationale: Fail fast before any network calls. No subprocess overhead.

decisions.decision: StateManager as module-level functions in bcdl.py (not a class, not new module)
decisions.rationale: 186-line codebase — a new module would be over-engineered.

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 2 to capture context for Phase 2: Download Reliability (retry logic + yt-dlp output capture). /clear first for fresh context window.
context_notes: Phase 1 complete. Full session: discuss-phase → plan-phase → execute-phase. 26/26 tests passing. RESM-01 satisfied. VERIFICATION.md shows 6/6 must-haves. Phase 2 depends on Phase 1 and requires retry logic (HTTP 429/5xx with backoff) + clean per-item terminal output replacing raw yt-dlp output.
